evals.name: snapshot-audit
evals.prompt: Audit the latest snapshot at radar/2025-01-22 for ADR quality issues.
evals.expected_output: A report.md with findings grouped by severity (errors/warnings/info) for each file in radar/2025-01-22, covering frontmatter, rationale, internal links, slug/title.

evals.name: broken-links
evals.prompt: Run an audit across the whole radar/ tree and report broken internal links.
evals.expected_output: report.md listing each /quadrant/slug/ link in any radar entry that does not resolve to an existing file under radar/*/<slug>.md. Indicate file + line + bad link.

evals.name: slug-mismatch
evals.prompt: Find any radar entries where the slug filename doesn't match the title field.
evals.expected_output: report.md listing files where the kebab-case form of `title:` does not equal the filename slug.
